overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern penthouse in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring open-plan living spaces with glass walls, wooden interiors, neon accent lighting, and panoramic views of a futuristic city and coastline. The camera smoothly moves through the living room, past a pool table, along an upper walkway, and into a bedroom with zen garden elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury living room with curved seating and glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the living room, observing the curved sofa and coffee table area

entered.detail: large curved beige sofa with metallic trim arranged in a semicircle
round glass table with bottles, cups, and food containers scattered on top
two large orange spherical pendant lights suspended from the ceiling
tall vertical wooden slats separating the living area from the exterior
large glass ceiling panels revealing palm trees and blue sky above
dark kitchen counter with stools visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxurious modern living room with a curved sectional sofa as the centerpiece. Warm sunlight streams through a glass skylight ceiling, illuminating the wooden deck flooring and modern furniture. The camera moves steadily forward through the space, passing a glass coffee table cluttered with drinks and snacks.

events.description: moving from living room seating area into the pool table recreation space

agents.ego_description: walking past the sofa toward the pool table area at the edge of the room

entered.detail: modern pool table with purple felt surface and metallic frame
bright blue neon LED strips running along the ceiling edges

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the living room furniture into a game area featuring a modern pool table with purple felt. Blue neon light strips become prominent along the ceiling, contrasting with the warm natural light. The wooden flooring continues as the space opens toward the exterior views.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway overlooking living area

events.description: ascending to upper walkway with overlook view of the lower living level
moving into darker corridor area with prominent blue neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony overlooking the lower living area below

entered.detail: glass and metal railing along the upper level overlooking the floor below
view down to the lower level living space with furniture visible below
digital screen mounted on the wall displaying abstract visuals

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an upper walkway with glass railings overlooking the lower living area. The lighting shifts to artificial neon blue strips along the ceiling, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. The space feels more enclosed with carpeted flooring and dark walls contrasting with the bright lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: master bedroom with zen garden and panoramic city views

events.description: entering bedroom area with large windows revealing coastal city view
bright sunlight streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows illuminating the space

agents.ego_description: walking through the bedroom toward the large windows overlooking the coastline and futuristic city skyline

entered.detail: indoor zen garden with raked sand patterns and stone features
massive glass windows spanning from floor to ceiling offering panoramic views
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the distance
blue ocean water and coastline visible through the windows
low platform bed with dark bedding positioned near the windows

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious master bedroom featuring an indoor zen garden with raked sand patterns. Floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a stunning view of a futuristic city skyline against a coastal backdrop. Natural sunlight floods the space, contrasting with the darker upper walkway area, highlighting the wooden ceiling and deck flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom corner with digital wall art

events.description: turning toward interior wall to focus on large digital artwork display

agents.ego_description: approaching and focusing on the digital wall art display mounted on the wooden wall

entered.detail: large rectangular digital display showing abstract art with red circle and teal waves
diagonal wooden paneling covering the wall behind the artwork

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the windows to focus on a large digital artwork mounted on a wood-paneled wall. The lighting becomes more subdued and artificial as the camera approaches the artwork, which displays an abstract composition with a red circle against teal and red textured background. The scene ends with a close view of the digital art installation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit, open-plan living area that gradually transitions into a moody, neon-lit upper corridor. It begins by gliding through a luxurious living room where warm sunlight pours through a glass skylight onto wooden decking and a curved sectional sofa. As the camera moves forward past a cluttered glass coffee table, the space opens into a game area where the natural light begins to blend with vibrant blue neon strips reflecting off a purple-felt pool table. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends onto an upper walkway with glass railings, leaving the bright lower level behind. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed, transitioning from wooden floors to dark walls and carpeting under the dominant glow of artificial cyberpunk lighting.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open master bedroom into a more intimate, dimly lit gallery space. It begins by gliding through the room, passing an indoor zen garden with raked sand patterns while natural sunlight floods the wooden ceilings and deck flooring. As the camera moves, the expansive view of the futuristic city skyline and coastline through floor-to-ceiling windows recedes into the background. The scene then shifts away from the daylight, moving toward a wood-paneled wall where the lighting becomes subdued and artificial. Finally, the camera closes in on a large digital artwork, focusing on an abstract composition of a red circle against a teal and red textured background.
